author: y4rr
content: Follow-up from Sprint C.7 (#626). GpuBackend methods: qr_f32/f64, svd_f32/f64, cholesky_f32/f64, lu_factor_f32/f64, eig_f32/f64, eigh_f32/f64, eigvalsh_f32/f64, lstsq_f32/f64, solve_f32/f64. Best approach on MPS: use Accelerate framework (LAPACK) via Metal command buffer completion callback, or MPSMatrixDecompositionCholesky. Dependency: macOS 14+.
